data.title: Melinda French Gates Talks About Navigating Panic Attacks And Personal Reinvention After Microsoft
data.description: Melinda French Gates shares insights on navigating life's shifts and prioritizing mental health. After her decades long commitment with the Gates Foundation, she now leads Pivotal Ventures in addressing women's issues.

data.title: Tesla Stock Is Trading Lower Wednesday: What's Going On?
data.description: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares are trading lower Wednesday following reports the company suspended plans to ship parts for its Cybercab and Semi from China.

data.title: Hertz Global Stock Soars After Pershing Square Hops In Passenger Seat: What's Going On?
data.description: Hertz Global Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:HTZ) shares are soaring in early trading Wednesday after Pershing Square Capital Management reported a significant stake in the company.

data.title: Why Are US-Listed Chinese Stocks Falling On Wednesday?
data.description: Major Chinese companies trading lower due to Trump's increased tariffs. China's GDP grew in Q1 but trade war dims outlook and prompts calls for stimulus.

data.title: 'Republicans For Higher Prices. How About That,' Says Elon Musk's Brother, Taking Aim At JD Vance's Stance On Cost Of Living
